## Meeting Purpose

[Tactical sales alignment and strategy discussion between Marcel Santilli and Tyler from growthx.ai](https://fathom.video/share/nam71z45Dxdy5JwUjm57sz-jFUSfqD1z?tab=summary&timestamp=10.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Use Marcel's LinkedIn/email for initial outreach; Tyler to build own reputation over time](https://fathom.video/share/nam71z45Dxdy5JwUjm57sz-jFUSfqD1z?tab=summary&timestamp=307.0)
  - [Focus on software, healthcare, SMB-focused companies, and those competing with incumbents](https://fathom.video/share/nam71z45Dxdy5JwUjm57sz-jFUSfqD1z?tab=summary&timestamp=574.0)
  - [Lead with AI search/discoverability value prop; emphasize team expertise and platform capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/nam71z45Dxdy5JwUjm57sz-jFUSfqD1z?tab=summary&timestamp=69.0)
  - [Prioritize immediate follow-ups and action items after sales calls](https://fathom.video/share/nam71z45Dxdy5JwUjm57sz-jFUSfqD1z?tab=summary&timestamp=1740.0)

## Topics

### Outbound Communication Strategy

  - [Initially use Marcel's LinkedIn/email for best shot at engagement](https://fathom.video/share/nam71z45Dxdy5JwUjm57sz-jFUSfqD1z?tab=summary&timestamp=307.0)
  - [Tyler to build own thought leadership and connections over time](https://fathom.video/share/nam71z45Dxdy5JwUjm57sz-jFUSfqD1z?tab=summary&timestamp=338.0)
  - [Leverage AI-led growth community for positioning and outreach](https://fathom.video/share/nam71z45Dxdy5JwUjm57sz-jFUSfqD1z?tab=summary&timestamp=402.0)
  - [Use Condo for direct messaging; coordinate with Dig for LinkedIn access](https://fathom.video/share/nam71z45Dxdy5JwUjm57sz-jFUSfqD1z?tab=summary&timestamp=493.0)

### Target Industries and Companies

  - [Software remains primary focus](https://fathom.video/share/nam71z45Dxdy5JwUjm57sz-jFUSfqD1z?tab=summary&timestamp=558.0)
  - [Expanding into healthcare with Biologica launch](https://fathom.video/share/nam71z45Dxdy5JwUjm57sz-jFUSfqD1z?tab=summary&timestamp=574.0)
  - [SMB-focused companies, especially those needing content for customer acquisition](https://fathom.video/share/nam71z45Dxdy5JwUjm57sz-jFUSfqD1z?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Companies competing with incumbents (e.g., Toast, Square, Webflow)](https://fathom.video/share/nam71z45Dxdy5JwUjm57sz-jFUSfqD1z?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [Series A/B companies, particularly those hiring marketing/content leads](https://fathom.video/share/nam71z45Dxdy5JwUjm57sz-jFUSfqD1z?tab=summary&timestamp=750.0)
  - [Use VC platforms to identify surging companies pre-funding announcements](https://fathom.video/share/nam71z45Dxdy5JwUjm57sz-jFUSfqD1z?tab=summary&timestamp=817.0)

### Competitive Positioning

  - [Main competitors: DIY tools (Byword AI, Jasper, Copy AI), high-end agencies (e.g., Graphite.io)](https://fathom.video/share/nam71z45Dxdy5JwUjm57sz-jFUSfqD1z?tab=summary&timestamp=1039.0)
  - [Differentiate with:](https://fathom.video/share/nam71z45Dxdy5JwUjm57sz-jFUSfqD1z?tab=summary&timestamp=1370.0)
    1.  Platform capabilities (e.g., agentic workflows for self-editing content)
    2.  Team expertise (e.g., ex-TechCrunch, Shopify, G2, TripAdvisor leaders)
    3.  Proven track record with notable clients

### Sales Process Improvements

  - [Prepare follow-up materials (Slack invites, availability, video links, SLWs) before calls](https://fathom.video/share/nam71z45Dxdy5JwUjm57sz-jFUSfqD1z?tab=summary&timestamp=1740.0)
  - [Aim for immediate post-call actions and scheduling](https://fathom.video/share/nam71z45Dxdy5JwUjm57sz-jFUSfqD1z?tab=summary&timestamp=1776.0)
  - [Create centralized resource for follow-up collateral (e.g., explainer videos)](https://fathom.video/share/nam71z45Dxdy5JwUjm57sz-jFUSfqD1z?tab=summary&timestamp=2669.0)
  - [Utilize Slack for quick reference connections between clients](https://fathom.video/share/nam71z45Dxdy5JwUjm57sz-jFUSfqD1z?tab=summary&timestamp=2193.0)

### Specific Deal Updates

  - [Plaid: High-priority; book meeting ASAP, leverage existing connections](https://fathom.video/share/nam71z45Dxdy5JwUjm57sz-jFUSfqD1z?tab=summary&timestamp=1804.0)
  - [Samsara: Continue nurturing, interim contact but potential for team buy-in](https://fathom.video/share/nam71z45Dxdy5JwUjm57sz-jFUSfqD1z?tab=summary&timestamp=1858.0)
  - [Zapier: Positive interest, consider podcast invitation later](https://fathom.video/share/nam71z45Dxdy5JwUjm57sz-jFUSfqD1z?tab=summary&timestamp=2226.0)
  - [Metronome: Set up meeting with Chris Kent for next steps](https://fathom.video/share/nam71z45Dxdy5JwUjm57sz-jFUSfqD1z?tab=summary&timestamp=2826.0)
  - [Hyper Exponential: Marcel to follow up via WhatsApp](https://fathom.video/share/nam71z45Dxdy5JwUjm57sz-jFUSfqD1z?tab=summary&timestamp=2978.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Tyler to book meeting with Plaid immediately after call](https://fathom.video/share/nam71z45Dxdy5JwUjm57sz-jFUSfqD1z?tab=summary&timestamp=1804.0)
  - [Connect with Jason to create webpage for follow-up video content](https://fathom.video/share/nam71z45Dxdy5JwUjm57sz-jFUSfqD1z?tab=summary&timestamp=2701.0)
  - [Tyler to send follow-up to Attentive using provided video link](https://fathom.video/share/nam71z45Dxdy5JwUjm57sz-jFUSfqD1z?tab=summary&timestamp=2710.0)
  - [Push for Braze call after their reference discussion with Mario](https://fathom.video/share/nam71z45Dxdy5JwUjm57sz-jFUSfqD1z?tab=summary&timestamp=3228.0)
  - [Continue nurturing ongoing deals (Metronome, Hyper Exponential, etc.)](https://fathom.video/share/nam71z45Dxdy5JwUjm57sz-jFUSfqD1z?tab=summary&timestamp=2811.0)
  - [Implement Slack-based reference connections for efficiency](https://fathom.video/share/nam71z45Dxdy5JwUjm57sz-jFUSfqD1z?tab=summary&timestamp=3193.0)
